1.0.0.en: Initial release: connect Frigate NVR cameras to Homey via MQTT with motion detection, object alerts and camera control.

1.0.1.en: Added BBox on snapshot image and device name to object detected tags

1.0.2.en: Split latest snapshot from object snapshots

1.0.3.en: Live stream at (500ms) and multi device import

1.0.4.en: Fix trigger issue and implement a app level trigger for object detection
